response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned staff-level full-stack engineer with 15+ years of experience, directly matching the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and demonstrating strong engineering discipline through consistent TDD advocacy, CI/CD ownership, and architecture contributions. His current role explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which directly satisfies the AI agent development requirement. The primary gaps are the absence of Nest.js in his listed experience, no explicit mention of Kotlin, and no direct citation of Jest/Vitest/Playwright — though his strong testing culture and library authorship suggest these are bridgeable gaps.
strengths: Direct match on core stack: TypeScript, Node.js, and React used across multiple senior and staff-level roles over 10+ years
Current AI agent and MCP (Model Context Protocol) framework work at re:cinq directly aligns with the AI agent development requirement
Demonstrated engineering craftsmanship: TDD practitioner, testing library author (Fluent-Asserts), and recurring workshop organizer on testing and software internals
concerns: Nest.js is the stated primary backend framework but is entirely absent from the resume — unclear whether experience exists but was omitted
Kotlin is not listed anywhere; only Java appears in passing for embedded/robotics work, leaving the secondary backend requirement partially unmet
Jest, Vitest, and Playwright are not explicitly named despite being listed required testing frameworks — strong TDD background exists but framework-specific proficiency is unverified

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
